subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, sun-faded and dusty, supports the signal head casting a short hard shadow while the lit red lamp burns against the pale sky, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex bleached bright and taut in the dry desert heat; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood filmed with fine desert dust under the harsh sun
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A desert highway intersection on an open arid plain under harsh bright midday sun with rising heat haze. The dry, sun-cracked asphalt bears a bleached painted white stop line and lane markings, flanked by scrub, sand and distant mesas shimmering on the horizon. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. The overhead sun casts short hard shadows and the red lamp burns clearly against the pale sky.

lighting.conditions: Harsh bright midday desert sun with heat shimmer
lighting.direction: Sun nearly straight overhead, casting short hard shadows
lighting.shadows: Short, very hard-edged shadows tight beneath the post, signal head and balloons, stable but shimmering at the horizon
lighting.illumination_effect: Intense high-contrast desert light with distant heat shimmer under which the illuminated red lamp burns clearly and balloon colors are bleached bright

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the desert highway leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the burning red lamp, mesas shimmering beyond
aesthetics.color_scheme: Hot arid palette of tan sand, bleached blue sky, sun-cracked grey asphalt, with the red lamp and balloons as saturated accents
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Stark, sun-baked, sparse, faintly whimsical from the incongruous festive balloons
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings, cracked-earth texture, heat-shimmer distortion, and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, burning red lamp, and overlapping green balloon against heat-shimmered distance

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the open desert highway under harsh midday sun, approaching the intersection where the red light burns against the pale sky and balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the bleached stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the balloons continue to sway in the dry desert wind.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the desert highway intersection under harsh midday sun; the single traffic light displays a steady red against the pale sky, with party balloons tied to the post swaying amid heat shimmer.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the traffic light and balloons closer; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the bleached stop line on sun-cracked asphalt; the red lamp stays lit and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping balloon is clearly framed against shimmering distance.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; balloons continue to bob in the dry wind.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons move amid the heat shimmer.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a desert highway across an open plain under harsh midday sun with heat shimmer, toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light burning steady red against the pale sky, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the dry wind. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the bleached stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the balloons still bobbing under short hard midday shadows amid shimmering heat.
audio_description: Ambient desert-highway sounds: dry gusting wind, faint insect buzz, distant sparse traffic, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Taut rustle of balloon ribbons in the dry wind. No speech or music.
